calendar.matters:
Ntc Of Mo To Compel Ans To Post-Judgt Disco
Off Calendar Aug-17-2006 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
NO APPEARANCES. TENTATIVE RULING ADOPTED.

Plaintiff Creditors Trade Association's Motion To Compel Answers To Post-Judgment Discovery is granted. No opposition has been filed. Defendant's failure to respond was a misuse of the discovery process. Defendant is ordered to respond within 15 days of notice of this order. Sanctions are awarded in the amount of $340, to be paid within 30 days of notice of this order.
COMM: EVERETT A. HEWLETT (612)
